title: Powerful Effects [Absolutely]
description: The mod adds several new very powerful effects, including immortality.
body:
![Title effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a7b268b2ee1dae549c917abb40227df3115eeea.png)
# Now your game will have new effects:

**Immortality – a state of absolute invulnerability. With this effect, no damage can harm you: not fire, lava, void, or even the /kill command. Your health never drops below full. It’s perfect for testing, exploring, or surviving in impossible situations.**

**Stop – the ultimate control over time and movement. When applied to any entity (including players), it instantly freezes them in place. Jumping, falling, walking, and sprinting become impossible — the entity is locked exactly where it stands, even in mid-air. It feels as if gravity itself has been disabled for that target.**

**Flight – unrestricted movement across the skies, even in survival mode. This effect allows you to fly just like in creative mode, but without switching gamemodes. You can soar above mountains, explore caves from above, or simply escape danger at any time.**

**Killaura – an effect that damages all mobs around the target. Every mob within 3 blocks takes 50% of its current health as damage each tick. If a mob’s health is already low, he die immediately. Particles appear on each mob to show they are being hit. Perfect for quickly clearing groups of enemies or testing combat effects.**



_**AND MORE!**_




**The mod also includes simple commands to toggle effects on and off. It’s lightweight, doesn’t require any extra libraries, and is designed to give you full control over the game world. Whether you want to experiment with power, stop time, or just fly for fun — this mod is for you. If you encounter any bugs, please report them!**

Commands:

/immortal_on /immortal_off
 

/stop_on /stop_off
 

/fly_on /fly_off

/killaura_on /killaura_off
 

/noclip_on /noclip_off

/explosion_gaze_on /explosion_gaze_off

/chaos_on

/health_absorption_on /health_absorption_on


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 


Also check out my other mods: https://modrinth.com/user/TheOman

**_Don't be disappointed with the mod if it has bugs. Everything will be fixed._**
